title: Exabeam Nova & Exabeam New-Scale Fusion Agent Behavior Analytics
description: Agent Behavior Analytics detects anomalous AI agent behavior using patented behavioral analytics. Exabeam Nova prioritizes risk with dynamic scoring and reduces the threat detection and investigation workload by up to 80% through automated investigation, timeline reconstruction, contextual summaries. The analyst assistant gives tier 3 power to tier 1 analysts and guides leaders on security program maturity.

items: Detect task replay, infinite delegation, or hallucination loops.
Enable human-in-the-loop (HITL) override thresholds on high-risk or ambiguous actions, LLM Incident Detection & Response, Runtime guardrails & moderation; anomalous tool use
